prompt: I'm stuck between a single orchestrator, a state-machine-driven workflow, and a set of thin skills coordinated by handoffs for a new repository-maintenance feature. I haven't decided whether resumability or simplicity matters more yet. Help me figure out the architecture options before we commit to implementation.
assertions: Response asks a small number of high-leverage clarifying questions or states explicit assumptions
Response produces multiple architectures shaped by the resumability versus simplicity trade-off
Response explains how the recommendation changes if resumability or simplicity becomes the top priority
Response does not stop at a neutral menu of options
